confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

filters.title: Filters
filters.subtitle: Add conditions to filter your data

errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.

preload.title: Loading Your Workspace
preload.pleaseWait: Please wait while we prepare your data
preload.failedSubtitle: Failed to load data. Please try again.

modeDecision.title: Choose Upload Mode
modeDecision.quickDescription: Use AI suggestions automatically. Best for clean, well-structured data.
modeDecision.advancedDescription: Review and customize all mappings. Best for complex or new data formats.

columnMapping.title: Column Mapping
columnMapping.heading: Map Source Columns to Target Columns

errorRecovery.question: What would you like to do?

tableNotFound.title: Target Table Not Found
tableNotFound.message: The table you selected for append no longer exists. It may have been deleted or renamed by another user.

schemaIncompatible.title: Schema Incompatibility
schemaIncompatible.message: Your CSV data has structural differences that cannot be automatically resolved with the target table.

permissionDenied.title: Permission Denied
permissionDenied.message: You don't have sufficient permissions to modify this table. Contact your administrator for access.

constraintViolation.title: Data Constraint Violation
constraintViolation.message: Some data in your file violates table constraints (unique keys, foreign keys, or check constraints).

transactionFailed.title: Transaction Failed
transactionFailed.message: The database transaction failed during data insertion. Your table was not modified.

llmServiceDown.title: AI Service Unavailable
llmServiceDown.message: The AI recommendation service is temporarily unavailable. You can still proceed with manual mapping.

networkError.title: Network Connection Error
networkError.message: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.

timeoutError.title: Upload Timeout
timeoutError.message: The upload took too long to complete. This often happens with large files or slow connections.

validationError.title: Data Validation Error
validationError.message: Some data in your file doesn't meet the validation requirements for the target table.

dataTypeMismatch.title: Data Type Mismatch
dataTypeMismatch.message: Column data types in your file don't match the target table schema.

columnCountMismatch.title: Column Count Mismatch
columnCountMismatch.message: The number of columns in your data doesn't match the target table.

duplicateKeyError.title: Duplicate Key Error
duplicateKeyError.message: Your data contains duplicate values for columns with unique constraints.

foreignKeyError.title: Foreign Key Constraint Error
foreignKeyError.message: Some data references don't exist in the related tables.

checkConstraintError.title: Check Constraint Error
checkConstraintError.message: Some data doesn't meet the table's data validation rules.

notNullViolation.title: Required Field Missing
notNullViolation.message: Some required fields are empty or missing in your data.

insufficientPrivileges.title: Insufficient Database Privileges
insufficientPrivileges.message: Your database user doesn't have the required privileges to perform this operation.

diskSpaceError.title: Insufficient Disk Space
diskSpaceError.message: The server doesn't have enough disk space to complete the operation.

memoryError.title: Memory Error
memoryError.message: The operation requires more memory than available.

connectionError.title: Database Connection Error
connectionError.message: Unable to connect to the database server.

serviceUnavailable.title: Service Temporarily Unavailable
serviceUnavailable.message: The upload service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few moments.

selectDifferentTable.label: Select Different Table
selectDifferentTable.description: Choose a different table to append to

createNewTable.label: Create New Table
createNewTable.description: Create a new table instead of appending

modifyData.label: Modify Data
modifyData.description: Fix data issues in your file first

switchToCreateMode.label: Create New Table Instead
switchToCreateMode.description: Create a new table with your data

reduceFileSize.label: Reduce File Size
reduceFileSize.description: Try with a smaller file or fewer rows

tryDifferentService.label: Try Different Service
tryDifferentService.description: Switch to a different backend service

refreshConnection.label: Refresh Connection
refreshConnection.description: Reset your connection and try again

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.description: Chat with the AI assistant to get help with your tasks

dashboard.pleaseLogIn: Please log in to access this content.
dashboard.noPermission: You don't have permission to access the "{view}" section.
